text:
Evangelion PianoForte #1 is an album by Shirō Sagisu. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-3216, it was released on 23 October 2013. https://vgmdb.net/album/40859 It is a collection of songs performed by pianists who arranged the piano arrangements with Shirō Sagisu. The cover was illustrated by Takeshi Honda.

Tracklist

Staff

Produced: Shirō Sagisu
Featuring Pianists: Junko Miyagi, Makoto Kuriya, Rumiko Kita, Ken Shima, Yasuharu Nakanishi
Guest Pianists: Yosuke Yamashita, Masanori Sasaji, Satoru Shionoya by the courtesy of Victor Entertainment, Inc., Kazumasa Matsumoto
Vocal and choir: Arianne, Bazil Meade and the London Community Gospel Choir
Sax and Flute: Osamu Koike, Junnosuke Fujita
Guitar: Takayuki Hijikata, 
Bass: Akira Okazawa
Drums: Yuichi Togashiki
Percussions: Kiyohiko Semba
Recording Engineers: Philip Bagenal, Koichi Suzuki, Masahiro Kawaguchi, Shirō Sagisu
Mixing Engineers: Masahiro Kawaguchi, Shirō Sagisu
Recording Studios: Eastcote (London), Sekiguchi-dai and Sony (Tokyo)
Mixing Studios: Ro-JAM (Tokyo), Beethoven (Paris) and Eastcote (London)
Mastered by Patricia Sullivan at Bernie Grundman mastering (Hollywood)
Production managers: Yuiko Mukaino and Yukiko Tanimoto (Ro-JAM)
